security_flags.description: ASSIGNMENT_OVERRIDES contains officer names and badge numbers (personnel data)
security_flags.notes: Badge-to-name mappings required for business logic. Cannot be externalized without breaking ETL. Low sensitivity — same data appears in Power BI dashboard.

security_flags.description: Hardcoded paths expose username (carucci_r) — standard for this workspace
security_flags.notes: Not a secret — carucci_r is the junction-resolved user profile. Documented in config-reference.md.
